title: US Military Preparing Weeks-Long Iran Campaign
detail: Reuters reports, citing two US officials, that the US military is preparing for sustained, weeks-long operations against Iran if Trump orders an attack. The campaign would target not just nuclear infrastructure but also 'Iranian state and security facilities.' Officials say the US 'fully expects Iran to retaliate, leading to back-and-forth strikes and reprisals over a period of time.' The report sends shockwaves through global markets.

title: USS Gerald R. Ford Ordered to Middle East
detail: The Pentagon confirms USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and Carrier Strike Group 12 — including destroyers USS Winston S. Churchill, USS Bainbridge, and USS Mahan — are heading to the Middle East after completing operations in the Caribbean. The deployment creates an unprecedented two-carrier posture aimed at Iran, with Ford joining the Lincoln strike group already operating in the Arabian Sea.

title: Global Day of Action for Iran Diaspora
detail: Reza Pahlavi designates February 14 as a 'global day of action.' Massive diaspora rallies draw over 250,000 in Munich and 350,000 each in Toronto and Los Angeles. Protesters demand accountability for the January crackdown that killed thousands and call for regime change. The rallies coincide with growing international pressure on Tehran.
